label: warm_accessible
style_positioning: Compassionate and plain-language communication focused on patient and caregiver understanding.
sentence_patterns: 对家属来说，最重要的是...。
这意味着...，不是奇迹，而是可预期的改善。
如果担心...，可以先从...做起。
rhetorical_devices: Translate technical claims into day-to-day implications
Keep terminology simple and define unavoidable jargon immediately
